name: Lap Desk/Tray - Brightroom™
description:
For maximum comfort and convenience while reading or working, choose this Lap Desk/Tray from Brightroom™. Designed with a wooden tabletop, this lap desk features a phone stand, cup holder, and a tablet holder to keep all your essentials close at hand. Plus, this lap desk comes with foldable legs for easy portability and storage when not in use.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
